group: F0. Official HCMC Career Sources v2 - Rules
sources: Career page does not prove a current HCMC opening; validate location on each posting.
Official company career pages and ATS tenants are preferred over job boards for attribution.
AI-inferred addresses must remain AI suggested, never verified.
Never auto-apply based only on company identity; require valid job URL, status, consent and threshold.

group: F1. Official HCMC Career Sources v2 - Grade A daily crawl
